name: bug-report-enhancer
description: AI-powered bug report enhancer that creates Jira tickets from screenshots

scripts.build:frontend: tsc -p tsconfig.frontend.json && tsc --target ES2015 --lib ES2020,DOM,DOM.Iterable --outDir public/js --strict false --skipLibCheck --noEmitOnError false src-frontend/settings.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
